svg.title: Casalithic Logo Concepts A–D
svg.desc: Four refined SVG logo concepts for Casalithic premium furniture brand
svg.text: A — Tree Ring + C monogram · Cormorant Garamond
B — Italian Arch + CL monogram · Playfair Display
C — Hexagonal Wood-Grain Shield · EB Garamond
D — Cabinet + Wood-Ring Split · Libre Baskerville
